name: Floch Forster
nativeName: フロック・フォルスター
description: Floch is a new recruit in the Survey Corps. He joined the Survey Corps during the two months between the attack at Orvud District and the return to Shiganshina District. ~!After the rest of the Yeagerists are killed during the port battle, Floch hides on the ship to Marley. After shooting holes in the fuel tank of the flying boat, Floch is ultimately killed by Mikasa.!~

name: Sensei
description: ~!He is a cursed being who was a doctor in the past. He found Shiva and took care of her while hiding from her that she was abandoned. He has a good heart and does everything for his little protégé, not hesitating to risk his life.!~

Instead, she communicates to others by using note pad, which usually pertains to her appetite. name: Imca
description: Imca, also known as "Ace Number 1", is a Darcsen Heavy Weapon specialist whose village was destroyed by the Valkyria. She joins The Nameless to seek revenge against the Valkyria responsible. She has a difficult relationship with Riela due to the latter's heritage.
mediaTitles: Senjou no Valkyria 3: Tagatame no Juusou

name: Kazuya Kinoshita
description: __Height__: 177 cm (5'10") A struggling university student living in Tokyo. He studies at Nerima University. Kazuya possesses a wishy-washy nature and is susceptible to yielding to his selfish desires. His lies often get him into trouble, because he cannot muster the strength to tell the truth. On the other hand, possessing a straightforward kindness that cares for those around him. He has also developed feelings for Chizuru.

name: Mikazuki Augus
description: A member of the Martian private security firm CGS. Calm and collected, with a head for the big picture, he's undyingly loyal to his friends. The most experienced mobile weapon operator in CGS, he is assigned to pilot the Gundam Barbatos. (Source: Gundam.info)
mediaTitles: Mobile Suit GUNDAM Iron Blooded Orphans
Mobile Suit GUNDAM Iron Blooded Orphans 2

name: Byakuya Ishigami
description: Byakuya Ishigami was a Japanese astronaut who was residing on the International Space Station when the Petrification on Earth's surface occurred. He was a kind, playful, and mischievous man who always found a way to amuse himself and keep things lighthearted, no matter the stakes. ~!He was [Senku Ishigami](https://anilist.co/character/124142/Senkuu-Ishigami)'s adoptive father.!~

name: Jinpachi Ego
description: __Height:__ 189 cm (6'2") General Director/Manager of the Blue Lock Project, handpicked to lead the project by [Anri Teieri](https://anilist.co/character/169405). Ego is introduced as a man who radiates ambition and confidence. His egotistical nature is undeniable, especially given his belief that only his methods can lead to Japan's victory in the World Cup.

name: Raku Ichijou
description: **Height:** 168 cm Son of a Yakuza family. He's intelligent but not an adept fighter. He likes sweet things, wants to marry a Yamato Nadeshiko and says he's the kind of person who has to do it absolutely correctly when he puts his mind into something otherwise he can't be satisfied.

name: Shiki Tohno
description: __Height:__ 169 cm Shiki is the main character of the Tsukihime series. He is a kind, honest, if not slightly playful second-year high school student. He is anemic and is prone to fainting, but he tries his best to live a normal life. He has the Mystic Eyes of Death Perception (Chokushi no Magan), allowing him to see the "Lines" and "Points" that enable him to kill all things using the highly effective assassination techniques hidden in his subconscious. name: Eli Ayase
description: __Height:__ 162 cm Eli Ayase is the student council president of the Otonokizaka High School. Along with her best friend, Nozomi, they do plans so the closure of the school could be prevented. She is partly Russian because her grandmother is a Russian. Alongside Nozomi, they join the school idol group for the prevention of their schools closure.

He is one of the rival characters to the player character in the Pokémon games, and appears numerous times to battle with the player. N is an idealistic activist that has adopted the Team Plasma philosophy of releasing Pokémon from human control, due to humanity’s constant abuse of Pokémon and their powers for battle and other practical uses. name: Rinko Yamato
description: A girl whom Takeo saves from a molester on a train. After Takeo saves her, she immediately falls in love with him. She attends Koizumi Girls’ Academy and is very skilled in making sweets. (Source: Wiki)

name: Rindou Amamiya
description: The leader of the offense team. Quick to joke around, but shows distinguished judgement and acting power in battle. He holds a serious secret and was reported MIA (Missing In Action) during the Moon in the Welkin mission.

name: Ryouko Tamiya
description: Shinichi's substitute math teacher. She is infected with a parasite.

name: Shuuichi Akai
description: ~!Akai Shuichi is an American of Japanese descent and member of the American Federal Bureau of Investigation, on special assignment in Japan to capture Vermouth. His superior is James Black and his partner is Jodie Starling.!~ ~!He had infiltrated the Black Organization under the name Moroboshi Dai - and the codename "Rye" - as a mole and dated Miyano Akemi, one of their low-ranking members, to feed information to the FBI. name: Kurumi
description: A young runaway girl of unknown origins who loves all kinds of games. She’s a terrible employee who reluctantly works in exchange for lodging. She only looks forward to gaming parties with the café’s regulars come closing time. ~!In some later episodes, it is revealed that Kurumi is actually the hacker Walnut.!~

name: Chocola
description: **Breed:** Black Cat Mix **Height:** 152 cm Chocola is a cheerful and energetic catgirl as Kashou himself describes her, 'happy-go-lucky.' She doesn't usually get upset, and even when she does, she often swings back to being as cheery as usual, though occasionally she can be genuinely sad about something. She is curious, and has a childlike outlook on things, which is fitting as she and Vanilla are mentioned to be only 9 months old in human terms. She likes Kashou.

name: Eris
description: Eris is the Goddess of Fortune and [Aqua's](https://anilist.co/character/89362) junior. Eris is a very kind and gentle girl who treats others with kindness and respect. She is also very caring and she always interest her adherents. She has a very cheerful attitude but at times can act a bit childish.
